name: Death by Chocolate (4)
recipeIngredient: baked in 13x9x2" pan & cut into cubes
prepared as directed -- cooled and thickened
crush and divide in half -- reserve some for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a large bowl with half the devil's food squares.
2. Douse the squares with Kalua liqueur.
3. Spread half the chocolate pudding over the squares.
4. Spread half the Heath bar shreds over the pudding.
5. Spread half the Cool Whip over the Heath Bars.
6. Repeat steps 1-5, and garnish the top with reserved pieces of Heath Bars.
This is a recipe that has always taken me by storm whenever I first tasted it. I make this dessert once a year, on Christmas, and the memory alone lasts all year.
